title: Extract ADLBC (Laboratory Analysis) variable metadata and derivation rules

inputs.prompt: Extract the ADLBC (Laboratory Analysis) analysis dataset metadata. This dataset contains 7778 records. Extract ADLBC analysis dataset variable metadata. Focus on PARAMCD definitions, reference range indicators (ANRIND, BNRIND), shift variables (SHIFT), toxicity grading (ATOXGR, BTOXGR), and analysis value chain (AVAL, BASE, CHG). Return as JSON with 'variables' and 'parameters' arrays.
